title: RBI (Urban Co-operative Banks — Classification, Valuation, and Operation of Investment Portfolio) Amendment Directions, 2026
description:
RBI amended Investment Fluctuation Reserve norms for Urban Co-operative Banks after operational difficulties in maintaining IFR. The revised rules permit drawdown of excess IFR balances beyond the mandatory 5% threshold.
The post RBI (Urban Co-operative Banks — Classification, Valuation, and Operation of Investment Portfolio) Amendment Directions, 2026 appeared first on TaxGuru.
